title: Jason
description: HR Fulfiller who works Case #8842 in #uk-regional-payroll, uses Proactive Assistance to view the Workday vs ADP mismatch, and approves a batch off-cycle correction for 76 employees.

overrides.introInstructions: You're viewing as Jason. Pick up Case #8842, follow the proactive mismatch alert, and close 76 discrepancies in one off-cycle run.
